subcodes.first_line: O thou sagacious one, the verses that stream and flow from the inspired genius of that nightingale of the meadowlands of inner meanings [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای نوش باهوش نظمی که از قریحه الهام صریحه آن بلبل چمنستان معانی ساری و جاری
subcodes.subjects: @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
